findings.description: The source h2 section (機能概要, marked with `--------`) contains h3 sub-sections (電文仕様 marked with `========` and エンティティ情報 marked with `================`) and the total plain-text content (feature overview paragraph ~300 chars + two message-format tables ~1100 chars + entity table ~800 chars ≈ 2200 chars) exceeds the 2000-char threshold. The knowledge file merges all of this into a single section s1 without splitting.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: `機能概要` (h2, `--------`), `電文仕様` (h3, `========`), `エンティティ情報` (h3, `================`). Knowledge file has only s1 covering all three.
